summary: Tested 3 NEW modifications to Reversement feature: (1) Tab renamed from 'Point Financier' to 'Reversement', (2) Billettage des Especes feature with FCFA denominations and 'Appliquer aux Especes' button, (3) Field renamed from 'Portefeuille / Credit' to 'Credit'. All backend tests passed (11/11). All frontend tests passed.

issues: Console warning: HTML hydration error - <tr> cannot be child of <span> in tbody. This is a React rendering issue but does not affect functionality. (Same as previous iteration)

passed_tests: ✅ Backend: GET /api/financial-points/{id}/pdf includes 'Billettage des Espèces' table
✅ Backend: PDF shows 'Reversement des Recettes' title
✅ Backend: Financial point without billettage works correctly
✅ Frontend: Billettage toggle button visible under Especes field
✅ Frontend: Billettage grid shows all 11 FCFA denominations (10000, 5000, 2000, 1000, 500, 200, 100, 50, 25, 10, 5)
✅ Frontend: 'Appliquer aux Especes' button updates cash field to billettage total
✅ Frontend: Toast notification confirms 'Especes mis a jour : 35 000 F'
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Console hydration warnings in HebdoReport table (span inside tbody) - cosmetic issue, does not affect functionality
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test financial points with billettage during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: 3 NEW modifications to Reversement feature fully working: (1) Tab renamed from 'Point Financier' to 'Reversement' in CaissePage.jsx line 7103, (2) Billettage des Especes feature added with 11 FCFA denominations (10000, 5000, 2000, 1000, 500, 200, 100, 50, 25, 10, 5) - stored in billettage dict field, PDF includes billettage table when present, (3) Field renamed from 'Portefeuille / Credit' to 'Credit' in PointFinancierTab.jsx line 235. All previous Reversement workflow features still working (reversed workflow, comparison table, PDF generation).

tab_rename.notes: Tab renamed from 'Point Financier' to 'Reversement' in Hebdo sub-tabs

billettage_toggle.notes: Toggle button visible under Especes field, expands/collapses billettage section

billettage_calculation.notes: Total billettage calculated correctly and displayed

appliquer_aux_especes.notes: 'Appliquer aux Especes' button updates cash_amount field to billettage total

billettage_storage.notes: Billettage object stored in financial_point document in MongoDB

billettage_in_pdf.notes: PDF includes 'Billettage des Espèces' table when billettage data present
